title: Need documentation for /etc/containers/registries.conf
body:
**Description**

There's no documentation that I can find quickly that explains how /etc/containers/registries.conf is used by Buildah.  We should document that somewhere and perhaps create a tutorial and/or mini-blog would probably be helpful.

comments.body:
Documentation that lists all the configuration files buildah references would be very welcome.

I had trouble finding specific documentation on `/etc/containers/storage.conf` when identifying this issue:
https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/issues/533
We now have docs explaining the file.
